test case id: tc-user-009 title: user places an order with invalid quantity module: user source pages: 1,6,7 preconditions: user is logged in and the menu is available. test data: - item: pizza - quantity: -1 test steps: 1. user selects "pizza" from the menu. 2. user enters "-1" as the quantity. 3. user clicks on the order button. 4. server processes the order. 5. server returns an error message to the user. expected result: user sees an error message indicating that the quantity must be a positive number.

test case id: tc-searchinstrument-001 title: search instrument performs a successful search module: search instrument source pages: 4 preconditions: search instrument is initialized. test data: - search query: "laptop" test steps: 1. search instrument is initialized. 2. search instrument executes the search. 3. search instrument receives the search results. 4. search instrument prints the search results. expected result: search instrument prints the search results.

test case id: tc-user-001 title: user logs in successfully module: user source pages: 6,7,8 preconditions: user has a valid username and password. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword test steps: 1. user enters "testuser" as the username. 2. user enters "testpassword" as the password. 3. user clicks on the login button. 4. server handles the login request. 5. server verifies the credentials. 6. server returns a success message to the user. expected result: user is logged in successfully and sees a success message.

test case id: tc-database-004 title: database handles an unsuccessful query request module: database source pages: 6 preconditions: user has an invalid query. test data: - query: "select * from non_existent_table" test steps: 1. user sends a query request to the server. 2. server forwards the request to the database. 3. database processes the query. 4. database returns an error message to the server. 5. server returns an error message to the user. expected result: user sees an error message indicating that the table does not exist.
